mapper.sql: id, unit_code, unit_name, symbol, category, conversion_factor, order_num, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_unit (unit_code, unit_name, symbol, category, conversion_factor, order_num, status, create_by) VALUES (#{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{symbol}, #{category}, #{conversionFactor}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_unit
unit_name = #{unitName}, symbol = #{symbol}, category = #{category}, conversion_factor = #{conversionFactor}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_unit SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
